ranked_movies.title: The Thing
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently mentioned as a top-tier horror film and cited as a first theater experience. Praised for its practical effects and enduring scare factor.

ranked_movies.title: Alien
ranked_movies.reason: Consistently recommended for its terrifying premise and masterful execution. Discussed as a benchmark for sci-fi horror.

ranked_movies.title: Hereditary
ranked_movies.reason: Highlighted as a modern horror masterpiece that deeply disturbed viewers, with specific scenes mentioned as particularly impactful.

ranked_movies.title: The Exorcist
ranked_movies.reason: Described as a timeless classic that remains terrifying even 50 years later. Often cited as the definitive horror movie.

ranked_movies.title: The Blair Witch Project
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently discussed for its revolutionary marketing and found-footage style. Noted for creating an unparalleled, believable theater experience.

ranked_movies.title: The Ring
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned multiple times as a film that genuinely terrified audiences and caused significant theater reactions.

ranked_movies.title: Signs
ranked_movies.reason: Specific scenes are recalled as some of the most effective scares in horror history, with the alien reveal being particularly memorable.

ranked_movies.title: Sinister
ranked_movies.reason: Praised for its sound design and ability to create a chilling atmosphere. Cited as a top theater experience.

ranked_movies.title: It Follows
ranked_movies.reason: Commended for its unique, terrifying concept and clever filmmaking techniques that build dread.

ranked_movies.title: The Descent
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as a brilliant and absolutely terrifying claustrophobic horror film.

ranked_movies.title: Event Horizon
ranked_movies.reason: Noted for its intense, hellish visuals and as a precursor to films like Dead Space. A cult favorite.

ranked_movies.title: Poltergeist
ranked_movies.reason: The original is mentioned as a foundational and still-effective horror film.

ranked_movies.title: 28 Days Later
ranked_movies.reason: Listed as the definitive horror film for England and praised for revitalizing the zombie genre.

ranked_movies.title: The Autopsy of Jane Doe
ranked_movies.reason: Highlighted as a top-tier slow-burn horror with a fantastic atmosphere.

ranked_movies.title: Scream
ranked_movies.reason: Cited as a formative horror movie experience for many and a definitive slasher film.

ranked_movies.title: Nosferatu
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned as Germany's definitive horror film and a classic whose big-screen experience is still special.

ranked_movies.title: REC
ranked_movies.reason: Listed as Spain's definitive horror film and praised for its intensity and effectiveness.

ranked_movies.title: The Wicker Man
ranked_movies.reason: The original 1973 film is noted as a classic and the definitive UK horror film outside of England.

ranked_movies.title: Train to Busan
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as South Korea's definitive horror movie and a standout in the zombie genre.

ranked_movies.title: Let The Right One In
ranked_movies.reason: Listed as Sweden's definitive horror film, praised for its story and chilling atmosphere.
